zh.lifeSummary: 當John Moulton於1385年出生在英國諾福爾可莫爾頓 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親William De Moulton25歲，母親Mrs. William De Moulton21歲。他於1409年與Margaret在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 莫爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年在英國英格蘭越可爾奧斯比享年109歲。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Moulton was born in 1385, in Moulton St Mary, Norfolk, England, his father, William De Moulton, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. William De Moulton, was 21. He married Margaret in 1409, in Great Moulton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1494, in Ormesby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 109.

Il a épousé Margaret en 1409, à Great Moulton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1494, à Ormesby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 109 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: John Moulton(이)가 1385년 영국 노르폴크 모우턴 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Moulton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William De Moulton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 모우턴에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 오메스비에서 109세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Great Yarmouth,: ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Moulton родился в 1385 г. в местности моултон ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Moulton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William De Moulton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret в 1409 г. в местности грит моултон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности ормесби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 109 лет.
